purpose: test a centered tensor residual that is exactly zero at initialization while preserving the Stage-C null branch

evaluation.initial_function_match: exact on present and null branches before any optimizer step
evaluation.active_adapter_gradient: nonzero on the first backward pass
evaluation.oracle_cal: must improve relative to the Stage-C and E0 references before generated-side rollout

boundary: one-seed mechanism repair only; no generated-side, tensor, F/RL or materials-discovery claim is unlocked by this protocol
source_boundary: initialized from the qualified Stage-C checkpoint; the frozen reference copy is captured before any E2 update
qualification_boundary: one-seed mechanism repair only; no generated-side, tensor, F/RL or materials-discovery claim is unlocked by this protocol
objective: common-noise orbit mimic plus null retention with a centered condition residual
